_comment: T3 Engine & Model resource pool. Each engine key is a vendor name. The 'protocol' field determines which adapter to use: 'cli', 'acp', or 'auto'. ACP is a transport choice; Copilot autopilot is a continuation policy under automation.continuation. 'automation.mode' uses normalized intent values, not raw vendor flags.

acp._comment: ACP-first transport. Optimus can satisfy auto-approve autonomy here because AcpAdapter auto-approves session/request_permission.

cli._comment: Native Claude CLI fallback when requested automation semantics are not sufficiently covered by ACP.

claude-code._comment: Claude engine with ACP-first auto protocol selection. Prefer ACP unless requested automation semantics require CLI-only behavior.

acp._comment: Copilot ACP transport. ACP inherently supports autopilot: agent runs to completion within session/prompt, permissions auto-approved via session/request_permission.

cli._comment: Native Copilot CLI path. Required whenever automation.continuation=autopilot.

github-copilot._comment: ACP is a transport; autopilot is a Copilot CLI continuation policy. With protocol='auto', Optimus may use ACP only when the requested automation mode and continuation are both compatible with ACP.

qwen-code._comment: path 'auto' = auto-discover Qwen Code CLI from VS Code extensions. Install the Qwen Code extension first.
